name: Paper Journal Default
description: Default paper pipeline: intake → requirements gate → LaTeX scaffold → parallel front/method → body + figure specs → parallel render/layout → humanizer → 2×(5 reviewers → merge → revision) → final PDF.

nodes.name: Intake
nodes.promptPreview: Collect user idea, experiment results, and target journal from inputs/idea.md, inputs/experiments.md, inputs/journal-target.md. Write paper/intake-summary.md with structured bullets. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Requirements analysis
nodes.promptPreview: Produce requirements and section map for the target journal. Write paper/requirements.md and paper/journal-architecture.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Clarify requirements
nodes.promptPreview: Review requirements.md and journal-architecture.md. Reply with any clarifications or corrections for the LLM before LaTeX scaffold.
nodes.outputContract: User clarification injected into downstream context.

nodes.name: LaTeX scaffold
nodes.promptPreview: Create paper/main.tex and empty section shells under paper/sections/*.tex per architecture. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Literature survey
nodes.promptPreview: Research survey for related work. Write paper/build/lit-survey.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Abstract & intro & related
nodes.promptPreview: Draft abstract, introduction, related work into paper/sections/01-front.tex. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Teaser figure spec
nodes.promptPreview: Write teaser figure prompt paper/figures/teaser-prompt.md and insert LaTeX placeholder with fixed width/height in 01-front.tex. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Methodology
nodes.promptPreview: Write methodology section paper/sections/02-methodology.tex. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Method figure spec
nodes.promptPreview: Write method figure prompt paper/figures/method-prompt.md and insert placeholder with size in methodology tex. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Experiments
nodes.promptPreview: Write experiments section paper/sections/03-experiments.tex from experiment inputs. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Conclusion
nodes.promptPreview: Write conclusion paper/sections/04-conclusion.tex. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Limitations
nodes.promptPreview: Write limitations paper/sections/05-limitations.tex. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Experiment figure specs
nodes.promptPreview: Write experiment figure prompts paper/figures/exp-fig-1-prompt.md and exp-fig-2-prompt.md; insert sized placeholders in experiments tex. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Render teaser
nodes.promptPreview: Generate teaser figure from paper/figures/teaser-prompt.md. Save PNG to paper/figures/teaser.png.

nodes.name: Render method figure
nodes.promptPreview: Generate method figure from paper/figures/method-prompt.md. Save to paper/figures/method.png.

nodes.name: Render exp fig 1
nodes.promptPreview: Generate experiment figure 1 from paper/figures/exp-fig-1-prompt.md. Save to paper/figures/exp-fig-1.png.

nodes.name: Render exp fig 2
nodes.promptPreview: Generate experiment figure 2 from paper/figures/exp-fig-2-prompt.md. Save to paper/figures/exp-fig-2.png.

nodes.name: Layout audit
nodes.promptPreview: Compile LaTeX draft and write paper/build/layout-audit.md with overfull boxes and figure placement issues. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Humanizer merge
nodes.promptPreview: Apply humanizer skill to prose sections; ensure figure paths resolve. Write paper/build/humanized-merge.md log. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: User polish confirm
nodes.promptPreview: Review humanized draft and figures. Continue to peer review round 1 after user approval.

nodes.name: Reviewer R1 #1
nodes.promptPreview: Independent objective review #1. Write paper/reviews/round1-reviewer-1.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Reviewer R1 #2
nodes.promptPreview: Independent objective review #2. Write paper/reviews/round1-reviewer-2.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Reviewer R1 #3
nodes.promptPreview: Independent objective review #3. Write paper/reviews/round1-reviewer-3.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Reviewer R1 #4
nodes.promptPreview: Independent objective review #4. Write paper/reviews/round1-reviewer-4.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Reviewer R1 #5
nodes.promptPreview: Independent objective review #5. Write paper/reviews/round1-reviewer-5.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Review union R1
nodes.promptPreview: Merge five R1 reviews into objective union paper/reviews/round1-union.md and actionable list JSON. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Revision R1
nodes.promptPreview: Apply review union objectively to tex sections. Log paper/build/revision-r1.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Reviewer R2 #1
nodes.promptPreview: Second-round independent review #1. Write paper/reviews/round2-reviewer-1.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Reviewer R2 #2
nodes.promptPreview: Second-round independent review #2. Write paper/reviews/round2-reviewer-2.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Reviewer R2 #3
nodes.promptPreview: Second-round independent review #3. Write paper/reviews/round2-reviewer-3.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Reviewer R2 #4
nodes.promptPreview: Second-round independent review #4. Write paper/reviews/round2-reviewer-4.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Reviewer R2 #5
nodes.promptPreview: Second-round independent review #5. Write paper/reviews/round2-reviewer-5.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Review union R2
nodes.promptPreview: Merge five R2 reviews into paper/reviews/round2-union.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Revision R2
nodes.promptPreview: Final objective revision pass. Log paper/build/revision-r2.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.

nodes.name: Final deliverable
nodes.promptPreview: Build final PDF paper/build/final.pdf and summary paper/build/final-deliverable.md. Read/write ONLY under paper/. Use exact artifact paths; never write to workspace root.
